'''logazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadragenarian|quadragenarian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadragenarian|quadragenarian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| logazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:logazhithi|logazhithi]] || [[word:logazhiji|logazhiji]] || [[word:logazhishi|logazhishi]] || [[word:logazhiki|logazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:logazhuthuthu|logazhuthuthu]] || [[word:logazhujuju|logazhujuju]] || [[word:logazhushushu|logazhushushu]] || [[word:logazhukuku|logazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:logazhuthu|logazhuthu]] || [[word:logazhuju|logazhuju]] || [[word:logazhushu|logazhushu]] || [[word:logazhuku|logazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:logazhufthuf|logazhufthuf]] || [[word:logazhufjuf|logazhufjuf]] || [[word:logazhufshuf|logazhufshuf]] || [[word:logazhufkuf|logazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:logazhethe|logazhethe]] || [[word:logazheje|logazheje]] || [[word:logazheshe|logazheshe]] || [[word:logazheke|logazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:logazhothotho|logazhothotho]] || [[word:logazhojojo|logazhojojo]] || [[word:logazhoshosho|logazhoshosho]] || [[word:logazhokoko|logazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:logazhotho|logazhotho]] || [[word:logazhojo|logazhojo]] || [[word:logazhosho|logazhosho]] || [[word:logazhoko|logazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:logazhofthof|logazhofthof]] || [[word:logazhofjof|logazhofjof]] || [[word:logazhofshof|logazhofshof]] || [[word:logazhofkof|logazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:logazhïfthïf|logazhïfthïf]] || [[word:logazhïfjïf|logazhïfjïf]] || [[word:logazhïfshïf|logazhïfshïf]] || [[word:logazhïfkïf|logazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:logazhïfthïfthïf|logazhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:logazhïfjïfjïf|logazhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:logazhïfshïfshïf|logazhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:logazhïfkïfkïf|logazhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:logazhïfthïf|logazhïfthïf]] || [[word:logazhïfjïf|logazhïfjïf]] || [[word:logazhïfshïf|logazhïfshïf]] || [[word:logazhïfkïf|logazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:logazhïfthïf|logazhïfthïf]] || [[word:logazhïfjïf|logazhïfjïf]] || [[word:logazhïfshïf|logazhïfshïf]] || [[word:logazhïfkïf|logazhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:logazhæthæ|logazhæthæ]] || [[word:logazhæjæ|logazhæjæ]] || [[word:logazhæshæ|logazhæshæ]] || [[word:logazhækæ|logazhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:logazhathatha|logazhathatha]] || [[word:logazhajaja|logazhajaja]] || [[word:logazhashasha|logazhashasha]] || [[word:logazhakaka|logazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:logazhatha|logazhatha]] || [[word:logazhaja|logazhaja]] || [[word:logazhasha|logazhasha]] || [[word:logazhaka|logazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:logazhafthaf|logazhafthaf]] || [[word:logazhafjaf|logazhafjaf]] || [[word:logazhafshaf|logazhafshaf]] || [[word:logazhafkaf|logazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:logazhasha|logazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:logazhshësha|logazhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logazhrosha|logazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logazhmusha|logazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:logazhyasha|logazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologazhnkshësha|gologazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologazhnkrosha|gologazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologazhnkmusha|gologazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologazhnkyasha|gologazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:logagazhasha|logagazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:logagazhshësha|logagazhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logagazhrosha|logagazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logagazhmusha|logagazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:logagazhyasha|logagazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologagazhnkshësha|gologagazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologagazhnkrosha|gologagazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologagazhnkmusha|gologagazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologagazhnkyasha|gologagazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:legæzhasha|legæzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:legæzhshësha|legæzhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:legæzhrosha|legæzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:legæzhmusha|legæzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:legæzhyasha|legæzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golegæzhnkshësha|golegæzhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golegæzhnkrosha|golegæzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golegæzhnkmusha|golegæzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golegæzhnkyasha|golegæzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:logfazhasha|logfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:logfazhshësha|logfazhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:logfazhrosha|logfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:logfazhmusha|logfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:logfazhyasha|logfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gologfazhnkshësha|gologfazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gologfazhnkrosha|gologfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gologfazhnkmusha|gologfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gologfazhnkyasha|gologfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
